response.justification: Candidate is an experienced senior developer with strong full-stack and distributed systems background, but the role specifically requires a C++ developer with deep expertise in STL, multi-threading, message brokers, MQTT, and IEC 62443 industrial cybersecurity. The resume shows only brief C/C++ exposure at National Instruments (Dec 2014 — Jun 2015) and a bachelor thesis project, with no evidence of recent C++ work, industrial automation experience, or SDL/IEC 62443 familiarity. Primary expertise is in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang — not the core stack required.
strengths: 8+ years of senior-level software engineering experience across diverse domains
Strong background in distributed systems, microservices, and high-throughput backend work
Demonstrated mentorship, workshops, and technical communication skills
concerns: Minimal recent C++/STL experience — only ~6 months at National Instruments a decade ago
No exposure to industrial automation, IEC 62443, SDL, or relevant protocols (MQTT, Modbus, OPC UA)
No evidence of message-broker-based architectures or industrial cybersecurity practices

key_factors.factor: No industrial automation or IEC 62443 background
Senior engineering tenure and architectural breadth
